tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Lewis Hamilton is one of the greatest Formula 1 drivers in history and has broken many records in the sport.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Hamilton has won multiple world championships and holds records for race wins and pole positions.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He is known for his speed, consistency and activism outside motorsport.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Max Verstappen is one of the most dominant drivers of the modern Formula 1 era.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won several world championships and broke records for most wins in a season.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Verstappen became the youngest driver ever to compete in Formula 1.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Michael Schumacher dominated Formula 1 during the early 2000s with Ferrari.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won seven world championships and set many records during his career.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Schumacher is considered one of the greatest racing drivers ever.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Ayrton Senna is remembered as one of the most talented and passionate Formula 1 drivers.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won three world championships and many Grand Prix races.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Senna was known for his incredible skill in wet racing conditions.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Sebastian Vettel dominated Formula 1 during the early 2010s with Red Bull Racing.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won four consecutive world championships from 2010 to 2013.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Vettel became one of the youngest Formula 1 world champions in history.
